homepage.text_excerpt: --> Judith Cummins top of page HOME ABOUT CONTACT Questionnaire NEWS SUBSCRIBE USEFUL LINKS Bradford South Working For "Judith is the Member of Parliament for Bradford South and the Deputy Speaker of the House of Commons. She is dedicated to championing stronger transport links for Bradford South, improving oral health, and securing better jobs for the constituency." About Judith Judith's Ongoing Campaigns Judith continues to fight for Bradford South on a range of issues, both locally and in the UK Parliament. She is a leading figure in pushing for NHS Dental Reform; She has been successful in securing new legislation to tackle dangerous driving; she passionately advocates for strong action against spiking; and she is active in a number of Foreign Policy areas vital to UK security and in relation to International Trade. Support a Campaign LATEST NEWS Read All News Judith calls "times up" for criminal fly tipping in Bradford South 2 days ago 2 min read Judith welcomes moves to tackle fireworks misuse Apr 8 2 min read Judith welcomes commitment to A650 Tong Street Mar 31 2 min read Judith on Social Media Judith on Instagram ​ ​ Follow us on Instagram @judithcumminsmp Load More Privacy Policy QUICK NAVIGATION Home A bout Judith Contact Judith News Campaigns Useful Links ​ STAY CONNECTED Facebook Twitter Instagram GET IN TOUCH Email: judith.cummins.mp@parliament.uk . ​ Tel (Constituency Office): +44 (0) 1274 924280 ​ Post: 26-28 Church Bank, Bradford BD1 4DZ ​ ​ Media Inquiries ​ Promoted by Andrew Thornton on behalf of Judith Cummins both at 6 Beechwood Road, Bradford BD6 3AQ. bottom of page

pages.title: About | Judith Cummins
pages.meta_description: Find out more about Judith Cummins, the Labour candidate for Bradford South.
pages.text_excerpt: --> About | Judith Cummins top of page HOME ABOUT CONTACT Questionnaire NEWS SUBSCRIBE USEFUL LINKS About My Work. Click here to read about Judith About Judith ​ ​ Judith Cummins is the Member of Parliament for Bradford South and Deputy Speaker of the House of Commons. ​ When first elected in 2015, she became the first woman Ruskin College parliamentarian . ​ Since being elected, Judith has successfully fought to save the Bradford Bulls and the National Science and Media Museum, and to increase sentences for dangerous drivers, as wel l as securing extra funding for NHS dentistry to Bradford South. ​ In parliament, Judith has campaigned for better transport links for the North (including bringing Northern Powerhouse Rail, which will boost our economy by £1.3bn, to Bradford) improving oral health, especially among children, and better jobs for the Bradford South constituency. ​ Judith has also consistently spoken out on protecting our NHS and giving the police the funding they need to fight crime. She has been working closely with community and faith groups to support people through tough times. ​ Judith was elected as the Deputy Speaker of the House of Commons in July 2024, and is responsible for Chairing debates in the House of Commons. ​ She lives in her constituency with her husband and two children. Privacy Policy QUICK NAVIGATION Home A bout Judith Contact Judith News Campaigns Useful Links ​ STAY CONNECTED Facebook Twitter Instagram GET IN TOUCH Email: judith.cummins.mp@parliament.uk . ​ Tel (Constituency Office): +44 (0) 1274 924280 ​ Post: 26-28 Church Bank, Bradford BD1 4DZ ​ ​ Media Inquiries ​ Promoted by Andrew Thornton on behalf of Judith Cummins both at 6 Beechwood Road, Bradford BD6 3AQ. bottom of page

headings: h2: Contact your local Labour Councillor
pages.text_excerpt: --> Contact | Judith Cummins top of page HOME ABOUT CONTACT Questionnaire NEWS SUBSCRIBE USEFUL LINKS How to Contact Judith I work hard to represent all constituents within Bradford South. I run regular surgeries within Bradford South, which you can request by contacting me directly. If you would like to get in contact with me, please complete the following steps: ​ 1. Check that I am your MP by clicking here ​ ​ 2. Please read our Privacy Policy by clicking here ​ ​ 3. Please use the below contact form, or contact details, to send me a message. Click here for the contact details of local Labour Party Councillors Contact Judith Cummins MP First Name Last Name Email Street Address Street Address Line 2 City Postal / Zip code Code Phone Policy Issue Choose an option Write a message I agree to the privacy policy View terms of use Submit Thank you for submitting! I will treat as confidential all personal information you have given to me or to my staff. I may need to pass on this information to others so they can help you. I undertake to handle the information you gave to me in line with the requirements of the General Data Protection Regulation and the Privacy Policy General Contact Details Email: judith.cummins.mp@parliament.uk ​ Tel (Constituency Office): +44 (0) 1274 924280 ​ Post: 26-28 Church Bank, Bradford BD1 4DZ Contact your local Labour Councillor Here you can find your local Labour Party Councillors within the constituency of Bradford South, organised by wards. To view councillors across Bradford City Council, click here. ​ To find your councillor by postcode, click here.
